title: scFM adapter meta (minimal documented subset)
description: Common fields returned by adapters/runners for exports and audit. Additional keys are allowed (additionalProperties).

force_pert_effective.description: Whether encoding-time protected-gene coverage was applied (see fm/docs/per_cell_pert_design.md)

pert_var_idx_slot_repair.description: xVERSE only: aligned matrix slots patched for protected genes (not a condition stream)

dataset_fitted_align.description: Obs/var counts after bench h5ad alignment with a reference file
